title: Pork Ramen Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Japanese-inspired dish made with pork, ramen noodles, and a variety of vegetables.
instructions: Cook the ramen noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet or wok, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced bell pepper and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the pork loin and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the sour soy sauce, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the cooked ramen noodles to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions.
